title: Can we change the dropdown delimiter in a workflow?

posts.author: cphu (Christine Phu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there a way to change the dropdown delimiter in an integration workflow from semicolons to commas?

I have a text field that I’m trying to sync from Salesforce to Monday.com.

The text field looks like this: test1, test2, test3

I need each ‘test’ to be a separate dropdown item.
